about.title: About AgentToolHub
about.description: AgentToolHub is an open directory of AI agent tools. We help developers discover MCP Servers, Skills, and Rules for Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, OpenClaw, and other AI coding agents.

footer.description: Discover the best tools for your AI coding agents
